_meta.title: A2A (Agent2Agent) section — whole-section intake decomposition
_meta.author: system-planner
_meta.note: OUTSIDE-IN = the section's structure (docs family, @agent-ui/a2a core, dev tools, arena, corpus, site, bridge). INSIDE-OUT = the needs, derived independently from Kim's verbatim goal + the a2ui SPEC-R5/LLD-C5 seam. External-protocol shapes are HOST-VERIFY items (n-hv) — nothing types an unverified claim.

nodes.label: doc family (PRD / SPEC / LLD / grounding ledger)
PRD a2a-section.prd.md (why/what, forks)
nodes.accept: `python ~/.claude/skills/prd-author/scripts/harness_checks.py prd .claude/docs/prd/a2a-section.prd.md` exits 0

nodes.label: SPEC a2a-foundations.spec.md (behavior + acceptance)
nodes.accept: `harness_checks.py spec` exits 0 AND `trace_check.py <prd> <spec> -` exits 0 (PRD<->SPEC coherent)

nodes.label: LLD a2a-tic-tac-toe.lld.md (arena implementation plan)
nodes.accept: `harness_checks.py lld` exits 0; every LLD-C traces to a SPEC-R

nodes.label: protocol grounding ledger (host-verified external claims + version pin)
nodes.accept: every HV-# row in the SPEC ledger carries a verbatim upstream citation + resolution date; zero unresolved rows before the Wave-1 build dispatch

nodes.label: protocol types (Message/Part/Task/AgentCard, version-pinned)
nodes.accept: `npm run check` green; protocol fixture round-trip test exits 0; every fixture pins the HV-resolved protocolVersion

nodes.label: total validator (coded failures, never throws)
nodes.accept: malformed-input corpus test proves totality (0 throws) + one test per failure code; exits 0

nodes.label: task lifecycle state machine
nodes.accept: transition-table test enumerates every legal AND illegal (state,event) pair against the HV-verified state set; exits 0

nodes.label: JSON-RPC framing (requests/responses/errors)
nodes.accept: rpc round-trip + error-envelope mapping tests exit 0 against HV-verified method names

nodes.label: in-proc loopback transport (deterministic, CI-first)
nodes.accept: ordered-delivery + backpressure test exits 0; zero network, zero timers-of-faith

nodes.label: agent-card model + validation
nodes.accept: committed card fixtures validate; missing/unknown-field fixtures fail with codes; exits 0

nodes.label: dev/server tools (Node-scoped, never in a consumer bundle)
HTTP JSON-RPC transport (server + client, dev)
nodes.accept: transport-invariance smoke: identical message sequence decoded over loopback and HTTP; exits 0

nodes.label: agent-card serving/discovery endpoint
nodes.accept: GET the HV-verified well-known path returns the committed card; the card validator passes it; exits 0

nodes.label: arena dev proxy (live match, keys server-side)
nodes.accept: `vite build` output greps clean of the proxy mount, endpoint, and key names (the a2ui SPEC-N2 manual-grep precedent); dev smoke streams one live turn

nodes.label: pure board + rules engine (legality, win/draw)
nodes.accept: rules unit tests cover all 8 win lines, draw, every illegal-move class; exits 0

nodes.label: referee turn engine (deterministic truth owner, not a model)
nodes.accept: referee state-machine test: alternation, structured illegal-move feedback, forfeit-at-bound, game-end notification; exits 0

nodes.label: player seat interface + scripted player
nodes.accept: scripted-vs-scripted match completes model-free; transcript byte-stable across two runs; exits 0

nodes.label: model player (isolated session, bounded move loop)
nodes.accept: stub-provider tests: legal move parsed; illegal feedback corrected within bound; forfeit at bound; abort honored; exits 0

nodes.label: match runner (constructs two disjoint contexts; wires seats to referee)
nodes.accept: end-to-end scripted match runs under `npm test` (no network, no model); exits 0

nodes.label: match transcript recorder + schema (wire + both full contexts)
nodes.accept: transcript schema validator passes the recorded fixture; a field-dropped mutant fails; exits 0

nodes.label: isolation gate (canary + wire audit + negative control)
nodes.accept: gate green on the committed match fixture AND exit 1 on the committed CONTAMINATED fixture (the negative control test asserts both)

nodes.label: recorded real-model match fixture (the flagship replay)
nodes.accept: committed transcript replays deterministically; isolation gate green over it; provenance (models, date) recorded in the fixture header

nodes.label: A2A concepts corpus (mirrors the a2ui corpus discipline)
record model + admission (facets concept|demo, pins, replay-clean)
nodes.accept: admission test matrix: one test per error code (schema/pin/replay); totality (never throws); exits 0

nodes.label: shard storage + standing data gate
nodes.accept: standing check-time gate re-validates every committed shard line (the corpus-data.test.ts precedent); exits 0

nodes.label: seed records (core concepts + the match demo record)
nodes.accept: >= 6 concept records + >= 1 demo (match transcript) record admitted; all replay-clean; standing gate green

nodes.label: a2a-tic-tac-toe page (replay + side-by-side context inspector + dev live)
nodes.accept: jsdom + browser legs green; static build renders the replay with zero network/keys; the isolation verdict badge is computed from the transcript in-page, not hardcoded

nodes.label: a2a-concepts page (corpus-derived)
nodes.accept: drift gate: the page's rendered concept set equals the admitted shard's record set; exits 0

nodes.label: site nav/TOC wiring for the section
nodes.accept: the standing site nav/TOC drift gates stay green with the two new pages wired

nodes.label: A2UI-over-A2A bridge (realizes a2ui streaming LLD-C5 / SPEC-R5)
nodes.accept: bridge smoke: an A2UI stream carried over A2A decodes identically AND a2uiClientCapabilities appear in Message.metadata (a2ui pipeline SPEC-R5 AC1); exits 0

actions.label: ground every external protocol claim in the authoritative A2A spec (host fetch, verbatim citations)
pin one protocol version and stamp it on every artifact (types, records, transcripts)
state the section's why/what, scope both ways, and the forks needing ratification
contract the section's behavior as testable requirements with acceptance criteria
enumerate the arena implementation: modules, error/edge cases, build sequence
represent A2A messages, parts, tasks, and agent cards as typed zero-dep structures
judge any wire artifact totally — coded failures, never a throw
enforce legal task-lifecycle transitions; reject illegal ones with a code
frame and parse the RPC envelopes, including the error mapping
carry ordered messages between two in-process endpoints deterministically
carry the same ordered messages over HTTP in dev with unchanged semantics
publish an agent card and discover a peer agent by it
own the only shared truth deterministically: legality, turn order, win/draw
produce a move from board state alone, via a fully isolated per-seat model session
feed an illegal/malformed move back structurally within a bound; forfeit at the bound
run a complete match model-free in CI, deterministic and byte-stable
record the complete wire transcript plus each player's full private context
prove zero cross-contamination mechanically (canary absence + wire audit)
prove the isolation gate itself bites — a contaminated transcript must fail it
replay a recorded match in the static build with zero network and zero keys
drive a live model-vs-model match in dev only, keys held server-side
expose both players' full contexts side-by-side for human inspection
admit only validated corpus records (schema + version pin + replay-clean artifacts)
store records byte-stably under a standing check-time gate
teach each core A2A concept with a validated, replayable worked example
derive the concepts docs page from the admitted corpus, drift-gated
route readers to the section from the site nav/TOC
carry an A2UI stream over A2A with client capabilities in Message.metadata (a2ui SPEC-R5)

edges.why: the types transcribe HOST-VERIFIED field names/states — typing unverified shapes bakes guesses into the core
requirements trace to ratified goal IDs; the fork resolutions (PRD-D*) fix the SPEC's shape
the LLD enumerates against frozen SPEC-R ids
the referee implements the LLD's enumerated turn state machine + error table
the validator checks the typed shapes
transitions are typed over the state union
envelopes frame the typed message union
the channel's send/receive signature carries the typed messages
the player parses and emits the typed board/move message shapes
the HTTP transport frames rpc envelopes on the wire
HTTP must mirror the loopback channel contract (transport-invariance is asserted against it)
serving publishes the validated card model
the referee drives move exchanges through the task lifecycle (input-required on an illegal move)
the referee applies the pure rules engine's verdicts; it never re-derives legality
the runner orchestrates the referee's turn engine
the runner needs the seat interface + scripted seats for the model-free CI path
the runner wires each seat to the referee over the in-proc channel — the isolation boundary is the transport
the recorder consumes the runner's event stream; its schema is the runner's output contract
the gate audits the transcript schema — no transcript, nothing to audit
the flagship fixture is a recorded real-model match
the dev proxy hosts a live match run server-side (it invokes the runner)
the replay page consumes the transcript format
the page's isolation-verdict badge reuses the gate's checker — one checker, no fork
the static page replays the committed fixture
the page's dev-only live mode reaches models only through the proxy (keys never in the browser)
admission replays each record's wire artifacts through the shared validator (parity, no fork)
the store persists admitted records only
seeds land through the admission + store path, never hand-append
the page derives from admitted records (the seed-shelf -> gallery derivation precedent)
nav wires pages that exist
nav wires pages that exist
the bridge rides the HTTP transport's Message.metadata seam (a2ui SPEC-R5's stated placement)
